name: Texas-Style Tortilla Soup
recipeIngredient: OR 2 beef bouillon cubes and water
OR 2 chicken bouillon cubes and water
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven, cook the chopped onion and garlic (and stew meat if using as the main course) in oil until the onion is tender but not brown. Drain well.
2. Add the blended tomatoes with juice to the Dutch oven along with all remaining ingredients except the tortillas and cheese.
3. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat. Simmer uncovered for 1 hour.
4. Add the tortilla wedges; continue simmering for an additional 10 minutes.
5. Serve hot in soup bowls, sprinkling with shredded cheddar cheese and additional picante sauce as desired.
Makes 6 to 8 servings, approximately 9 cups of soup.
